landing.tagline: AI-powered liver diagnostics and surgical planning for hepatobiliary surgeons and abdominal radiologists.

v1.title: What v1 does
v1.kicker: Zero-training cascaded pipeline · Apache 2.0 model stack

upload.title: Upload → 3D + FLR
upload.body: 4-phase contrast CT in, interactive Couinaud segmentation + future-liver-remnant readout out. Target 5 minutes end-to-end.

lesionDetection.title: Lesion detection
lesionDetection.body: 6-class tumor classifier (HCC, ICC, MET, FNH, HEM, CYST) with calibrated abstention.

refinement.title: Interactive refinement
refinement.body: VISTA3D one-click mask correction + MedSAM-2 lesion re-prompt. Offline-durable edits.

finalize.title: Finalize & PACS
finalize.body: DICOM-SEG + SR + PDF with burned-in RUO watermark. Transactional PACS push with retry.

compliance.title: Compliance & audit
compliance.body: Per-tenant chain-of-hashes audit log, daily Merkle anchors to S3 Object Lock, MBoM tracking.

erasure.title: GDPR Art. 17 erasure
erasure.body: Per-case KMS key with < 60 s crypto-shred. 404-on-disclosure preserved.

footer.ce: CE MDR Class IIb track · 24–30 months

hub.title: Help & resources
hub.subtitle: Guides, keyboard shortcuts, and references for day-to-day use.

sampleCase.title: Run the sample case
sampleCase.body: Ship-ready demo dataset that exercises upload → 3D → lesions → finalize end-to-end.

glossary.title: Clinical glossary
glossary.body: Couinaud segments, vessels, lesion classes, contrast phases, abbreviations.

keyboard.title: Keyboard shortcuts
keyboard.body: Speed up refinement with V (VISTA3D add), B (subtract), L (lesion prompt), Ctrl-Z / Ctrl-Y.

ruoPolicy.title: RUO policy
ruoPolicy.body: What Research Use Only means for your outputs, how scope narrows when claims clear conformity.

tutorials.title: Video tutorials
tutorials.body: Short walkthroughs: upload a study, review a case, sign off a report.

support.title: Contact support
support.body: Reach engineering + compliance via the support inbox.

ruo.title: Research Use Only — what it means
ruo.intro: Every output from LiverRa v1 is marked Research Use Only. That means outputs inform but do not replace clinical judgement.
ruo.whatItMeansBody: Volumes, lesion classes, FLR percentages, and segmentations are shown for investigative and planning context. Treatment decisions remain the responsibility of a qualified physician.
ruo.narrowingBody: As individual claims (parenchyma volumetry, FLR, segmentation, vessels, lesion detection + classification, surgical planning) clear conformity assessment, the disclaimer text automatically narrows for that claim. See the Claim registry.
